arena: linux kernel clone, full-tree store (~274k nodes), cwd = repo root, read-only

questions.text: Where are requests hashed for elevator merge lookups?
Which function splits a bio into segments?
Where does a new disk get added with its partitions?
Where is OPAL self-encrypting drive unlock handled?
Where is the flush request pending queue managed?
Where are request timeouts handled in the block layer?
Where are user pages mapped into a block request?
Where does blk-mq submit a bio onto a queue?
